label: true-dup
a: Added PostgreSQL read replicas. Analytics dashboard queries (10-30 second reporting queries) are routed to replicas, leaving the primary database exclusively for OLTP writes and reads. Replication lag is 1-2 seconds, which the analytics team confirmed is acceptable.
b: Introduced read replicas to isolate analytics query load from production OLTP traffic. The primary handles all writes. A replica connection pool is used for reporting queries. The analytics team accepts up to 2 seconds of staleness.
reviewer_notes: Both describe routing analytics queries to PG read replicas with the same 1–2s lag acceptance.
